name: universal-harmonix
description: UAP investigation and verification app — Universal Harmonix theory by James Brodie

scripts.test: node --test tests/verification.test.js tests/format.test.js tests/sky.test.js tests/parse-tags.test.js tests/build-prompt.test.js
scripts.test:contract: node --test tests/contract/opensky.contract.test.js tests/contract/iss.contract.test.js tests/contract/weather.contract.test.js tests/contract/starlink.contract.test.js tests/contract/kp.contract.test.js tests/contract/solar-wind.contract.test.js tests/contract/nominatim.contract.test.js tests/contract/postcodes.contract.test.js
scripts.test:acceptance: node --test tests/acceptance/sighting-log.test.js tests/acceptance/location.test.js tests/acceptance/sky-activity.test.js tests/acceptance/photo-background.test.js tests/acceptance/tagging-pipeline.test.js
scripts.test:all: node --test tests/verification.test.js tests/format.test.js tests/sky.test.js tests/parse-tags.test.js tests/build-prompt.test.js tests/acceptance/sighting-log.test.js tests/acceptance/location.test.js tests/acceptance/sky-activity.test.js tests/acceptance/photo-background.test.js tests/acceptance/tagging-pipeline.test.js
scripts.check: node --check app/js/domain.js app/js/storage.js app/js/format.js app/js/location.js app/js/sky.js

author: LeanSpirited (Rod)
